Modal.download_app_title: Download the app and start saving delicious food

Home.hero_desc: Discover affordable packages from nearby businesses, save money, and contribute to sustainable consumption.
Home.what_is_heading: Save the Flavors of the Day!
Home.what_is_desc: With <highlight>Supafo</highlight>, get unsold, fresh, and delicious food from hundreds of cafes and restaurants every day at incredible discounts. Save money while also taking a meaningful step for our planet. <highlight>Supafo</highlight> is with you in this beautiful mission you want to bring to life!
Home.bag_heading_1: Be Eco-Friendly with the Supafo Tote Bag!
Home.bag_desc_1: Say goodbye to plastic bags and show your style while protecting nature!
Home.bag_heading_2: Its natural texture and elegant design make it perfect for every moment.
Home.bag_desc_2: Discover timeless style with durable, stylish, and 100% cotton Supafo tote bags.
Home.bag_heading_3: Join the Movement, Make a Difference – Be Part of the Solution, Not the Waste!
Home.bag_desc_3: With every bag you purchase, you contribute to planting a sapling.
Home.journey_desc: With Supafo, you are not only saving food, but also choosing a more conscious and healthier lifestyle by supporting local products.
Home.ai_title: The Technology of the Future, Coming Soon to Supafo!
Home.ai_desc: The future is almost here! Our new AI-powered features are on the way to bring more benefits to you and the planet. Get ready to step into Supafo’s AI journey!
Home.donation_title: Join Goodness with Supafo – Support and Start the Change!
Home.donation_heading_1: With our donation area that will be active soon:
Home.donation_desc_1: Join the Supafo Fund – Let Us Deliver It on Your Behalf! Your donation will safely reach people in need, environmental projects, and social support initiatives.
Home.donation_desc_2: Take action to support society, nature, and people in need!

faq.a1: Supafo is a mobile application created to help prevent food waste. It offers products left over at the end of the day by businesses, while still preserving their freshness and quality, to users as discounted “Surprise Packages.”
faq.q2: Why are the package contents a surprise?
faq.a2: The type and quantity of products vary depending on the businesses’ daily sales. This method helps prevent waste at the highest level while also allowing you to buy quality food at a price far below market value.
faq.q3: How can I place an order?
faq.a3: After the active packages from businesses near your selected location are listed in the app, you can add the Surprise Package you like to your cart and complete the secure payment step.
faq.q4: How can I make the payment?
faq.a4: Payments are accepted only through the app, online by card. For your security, we do not store your card information and it is never shared with third parties.
faq.q5: How will I collect the package I purchased?
faq.a5: After completing the payment, go to the business within the specified pickup time window, show your personal QR code in the app, confirm your order, and collect it.
faq.q6: Can I cancel the package I purchased?
faq.a6: No. Since Surprise Packages are time-limited special offers intended to prevent waste, cancellation or changes are not possible after purchase.
faq.q7: What should I do if the package is sold out when I arrive at the business?
faq.a7: If you encounter such a situation, please immediately create a Support Request through the app. The Supafo team will review the issue and provide a full refund or an alternative solution.
faq.q8: What happens if I arrive outside the pickup time?
faq.a8: Businesses guarantee pickup only within the announced pickup time window. If you arrive outside this time range, delivery of your package cannot be guaranteed.
faq.q9: How can I delete or close my account?
faq.a9: To delete your account, go to 'My Profile' > 'My Account Information' and use the 'Delete My Account' button.
faq.q10: How can I contact the Supafo support team?
faq.a10: You can call us through the 'My Profile' > 'Our Support Team' tab in the app or send an email directly to support@supafo.com.

AboutUs.desc_1: At <brand>Supafo</brand>, we started with a simple truth: food is too valuable to be wasted. Every day, tons of fresh and delicious food — from bakery items to restaurant meals — are thrown away for no good reason. This waste is not only an economic loss, but also a serious harm to the planet.
AboutUs.desc_2: <brand>Supafo</brand> is a technology-driven solution to this problem. By helping restaurants and cafes offer their surplus food at incredible discounts, we create a true win-win for businesses, the planet, and you.
AboutUs.mission_desc: Our mission is to build a world where food waste no longer exists and where everyone can easily access quality food at affordable prices. We are not just an app; we are a movement that lets you contribute to a more sustainable future with every purchase you make.
AboutUs.vision_desc: Our vision is to make <brand>Supafo</brand> one of the strongest tools in the global fight against food waste and inspire everyone to make more responsible choices.
AboutUs.principles_title: The principles behind <brand>Supafo</brand> are simple, but powerful:
AboutUs.principle_1_desc: We help protect the planet by preventing tons of CO₂e emissions every day.
AboutUs.principle_2_desc: Using AI, we find the best opportunities and help you save more while also supporting our partners’ growth.
AboutUs.principle_3_desc: We are more than an app; we are a growing community taking action together against food waste.
AboutUs.join_desc: Be part of this movement. Download the app, save delicious meals, and start the change with yourself!

Career.title: Career
Career.subtitle: The Place for People Who Want to Make a Difference
Career.desc_1: We are not just doing a job; we are investing in the future of the planet by fighting food waste. For us, every team member is not just part of the team, but also a source of strength behind this mission. Every step you take at Supafo helps prevent hundreds of thousands of fresh products from going to waste and gives our planet real breathing room.
Career.desc_2: Here, your knowledge and dedication are noticed directly and rewarded with the fast growth you deserve. If you are looking for a purpose-driven career, join us in our mission to make the world a more livable place through technology.
Career.intern_1_subtitle: New opportunities are waiting for you!
Career.intern_2_subtitle: Grow your knowledge and develop your skills!
